name: visually-hidden
visual_summary: A low-level, containerless component to hide content from screen readers. A developer would use this when they want to present content visually to screen-readers but keep it invisible to sighted users. It's typically used with text or other elements that don't fit within the existing layout.
generation_prompt:

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation

- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
